title: Airlines spent 56.4% more on jet fuel in month after Iran war started, U.S. government says
summary_full: U.S. airlines spent 56.4% more on jet fuel in March than they did in February, U.S. government data released Wednesday shows.
summary_public: U.S. airlines spent 56.4% more on jet fuel in March than they did in February, U.S. government data released Wednesday shows.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Airlines spent 56.4% more on jet fuel in month after Iran war started
